name: warung-digital
description: Platform keuangan & stok warung — Den Ana Brontolano Retail

scripts.install:all: cd tier1-lite && echo 'Copy files to script.google.com manually' && cd ../tier2-pro/backend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.build: cd tier2-pro/frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build
scripts.test: cd tier2-pro/backend && npm test && cd ../frontend && npm test
